text.title: Zero-Click Search Adaptation Procedure
text.summary: Deterministic 5-step procedure: gather inputs → load rules → draft artefact → self-check → validate-and-return. Each step has an input, action, output, and decision gate.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.input: All listed prerequisites are available locally.
step.action: Collect: GSC last-90d query CSV export, Top-10 SERP snapshot for target query, Original data points with dates. Validate each against the artefact-source listed in the Prerequisites table.
step.output: An input bundle satisfying every Prerequisite row.
step.decision-gate: Any missing prerequisite → defer to the Decision Tree's skip branch.

step.name: load-rules
step.action: Read every <rule> from content/01-core-rules.xml. Apply rule ids: r1-cite-over-traffic, r2-schema-mandatory, r3-direct-answer-lede, r4-original-data, r5-kpi-rebalance, r6-lag-90d.
step.output: Rule context loaded into the subagent.
step.decision-gate: Any rule flagged as inapplicable → log; do not silently skip.

step.name: draft-artefact
step.action: Draft a candidate artefact populating fields: page_url, target_query, owner + remaining required fields per content/02-output-contract.xml.
step.output: Candidate artefact in the output schema's shape.
step.decision-gate: Required fields missing → block; do not return partial artefact.

step.name: self-check
step.action: Run the Self-check checklist from 02-output-contract.xml against the artefact; cross-check against every <failure-mode> detector in 03-failure-modes.xml.
step.decision-gate: Any FAIL → apply repair from the matching failure-mode and loop back to step 3.

step.name: validate-and-return
step.action: Invoke scripts/validate-zero-click-search-adaptation.py against the artefact JSON. On exit code 0, return to caller; surface 'ready for owner review' flag.
step.decision-gate: Validator exit != 0 → re-run with the printed violations as the repair plan.
